schematics.name: 👻 Spooky Medieval Manor
schematics.author: oDilan
schematics.description: A detailed medieval fantasy house featuring a striking red gabled roof, stone tower, and warm wooden framework. This build combines rustic charm with elegant structure, including a cozy entrance, layered roofing, and realistic depth. Perfect for survival bases, medieval towns, or scenic landscapes.

schematics.name: 🏠Medieval Manor
schematics.author: oDilan
schematics.description: A warm medieval house featuring a detailed stone tower, steep orange roof, and cozy wooden framing. The build includes a charming entrance, soft lighting accents, and realistic depth, making it perfect for survival bases, medieval towns, or aesthetic landscapes.
